title: athyrium davaoense
intro: Athyrium davaoense, a species of fern also known as Davao Lady Fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the Athyriaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and analgesic properties. The health benefits of Athyrium davaoense include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve respiratory function, and provide antioxidant protection. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical applications, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and risks.
